_comment: adr-kit project policy — see docs/adr/.adr-kit.json schema in plugin for full reference.
_clarity_note: Clarity gate is always_advisory because the tool has no acronym whitelist. Project-domain acronyms (MQTT, OTGW, HTTP, REST, PIC, ESP8266, FIFO, ...) are well-known in context and expanding them in 79 existing Accepted ADRs would violate the immutability rule. New ADRs should still avoid bare adjectives and use imperative voice — adr-generator enforces this at authoring time.
